title: drimia angustifolia
intro: Drimia angustifolia, also known as the narrow-leaved dragon or sea onion, is a type of plant that belongs to the Asparagaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Drimia angustifolia include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
